Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Lirial Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — The Lirial Incarnation is a featureless statue made of white crystal wrapped in silver wire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Lirial is the Incarnation of Lirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — The Lirial Incarnation was behind Zakareth at the gates of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Lirial Incarnation kicked Indirial with a foot hard as stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Lirial Incarnation held a crystal lens in her left hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Lirial Incarnation has a crystal leg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon deflected the Lirial Incarnation's white bolts with his blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Lirial Incarnation is a crystal Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Lirial Incarnation attacked Leah's crystal shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Lirial Incarnation can shatter into three pieces like thin glass upon hitting cobblestones.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
